Published: 2022-01-01T01:15:08.990

CVE: CVE-2021-41817
Published: 2022-01-01T05:15:08.197
Description: Date.parse in the date gem through 3.2.0 for Ruby allows ReDoS (regular expression Denial of Service) via a long string. The fixed versions are 3.2.1, 3.1.2, 3.0.2, and 2.0.1.

CVE: CVE-2021-44716
Published: 2022-01-01T05:15:08.307
Description: net/http in Go before 1.16.12 and 1.17.x before 1.17.5 allows uncontrolled memory consumption in the header canonicalization cache via HTTP/2 requests.

CVE: CVE-2021-44717
Published: 2022-01-01T05:15:08.367
Description: Go before 1.16.12 and 1.17.x before 1.17.5 on UNIX allows write operations to an unintended file or unintended network connection as a consequence of erroneous closing of file descriptor 0 after file-descriptor exhaustion.

CVE: CVE-2021-41819
Published: 2022-01-01T06:15:07.293
Description: CGI::Cookie.parse in Ruby through 2.6.8 mishandles security prefixes in cookie names. This also affects the CGI gem through 0.3.0 for Ruby.

CVE: CVE-2021-43333
Published: 2022-01-01T06:15:07.397
Description: The Datalogic DXU service on (for example) DL-Axist devices does not require authentication for configuration changes or disclosure of configuration settings.

CVE: CVE-2021-44852
Published: 2022-01-01T06:15:07.453
Description: An issue was discovered in BS_RCIO64.sys in Biostar RACING GT Evo 2.1.1905.1700. A low-integrity process can open the driver's device object and issue IOCTLs to read or write to arbitrary physical memory locations (or call an arbitrary address), leading to execution of arbitrary code. This is associated with 0x226040, 0x226044, and 0x226000.

CVE: CVE-2021-45960
Published: 2022-01-01T19:15:08.030
Description: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, a left shift by 29 (or more) places in the storeAtts function in xmlparse.c can lead to realloc misbehavior (e.g., allocating too few bytes, or only freeing memory).

CVE: CVE-2021-45972
Published: 2022-01-01T21:15:07.730
Description: The giftrans function in giftrans 1.12.2 contains a stack-based buffer overflow because a value inside the input file determines the amount of data to write. This allows an attacker to overwrite up to 250 bytes outside of the allocated buffer with arbitrary data.

CVE: CVE-2021-44896
Published: 2022-01-01T23:15:08.647
Description: DMP Roadmap before 3.0.4 allows XSS.

CVE: CVE-2022-22293
Published: 2022-01-02T00:15:09.673
Description: admin/limits.php in Dolibarr 7.0.2 allows HTML injection, as demonstrated by the MAIN_MAX_DECIMALS_TOT parameter.

CVE: CVE-2022-0080
Published: 2022-01-02T12:15:07.690
Description: mruby is vulnerable to Heap-based Buffer Overflow

CVE: CVE-2021-36751
Published: 2022-01-02T16:15:07.860
Description: ENC DataVault 7.2.3 and before, and OEM versions, use an encryption algorithm that is vulnerable to data manipulation (without knowledge of the key). This is called ciphertext malleability. There is no data integrity mechanism to detect this manipulation.

CVE: CVE-2022-0079
Published: 2022-01-03T03:15:07.013
Description: showdoc is vulnerable to Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information

CVE: CVE-2021-25981
Published: 2022-01-03T07:15:06.943
Description: In Talkyard, regular versions v0.2021.20 through v0.2021.33 and dev versions v0.2021.20 through v0.2021.34, are vulnerable to Insufficient Session Expiration. This may allow an attacker to reuse the admin’s still-valid session token even when logged-out, to gain admin privileges, given the attacker is able to obtain that token (via other, hypothetical attacks)

CVE: CVE-2021-25994
Published: 2022-01-03T07:15:07.243
Description: In Userfrosting, versions v0.3.1 to v4.6.2 are vulnerable to Host Header Injection. By luring a victim application user to click on a link, an unauthenticated attacker can use the “forgot password” functionality to reset the victim’s password and successfully take over their account.
